name: Ninfa's Chicken Fajita Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces salad mix (favorite choice of greens)
1/2 ounce grated monterey jack or cheddar cheese
3 ounces sliced, charbroiled chicken fajitas, seasoned to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly toss the salad mix.
2. Sprinkle with grated cheese and tortilla strips.
3. Garnish the edges of the salad with tomato slices, lemon slice, and black olive.
4. Arrange the sliced chicken fajitas on top.
5. If using onion rings, place them on top as well.
6. Dress the salad with prepared vinaigrette or red salsa.
7. Makes 1 serving.
